member.name: T:Biconomy.Net.BiconomyAuthenticationProvider
member.summary: Authentication provider for the Biconomy REST API.

member.summary: Create a new Biconomy authentication provider.

member.name: M:Biconomy.Net.BiconomyCredentials.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create new credentials providing credentials in HMAC format.

member.name: M:Biconomy.Net.BiconomyCredentials.#ctor(CryptoExchange.Net.Authentication.HMACCredential)
member.summary: Create new credentials from HMAC credentials.

member.name: M:Biconomy.Net.BiconomyEnvironment.#ctor
member.summary: ctor for DI, use for creating a custom environment.

member.name: M:Biconomy.Net.BiconomyEnvironment.GetEnvironmentByName(System.String)
member.summary: Get the Biconomy environment by name.
member.returns: The environment, or null when unknown.

member.name: T:Biconomy.Net.BiconomyErrors
member.summary: Biconomy error catalogs. Intentionally empty; wrapper-side error mapping is test-driven.

member.name: T:Biconomy.Net.BiconomyExchange
member.summary: Biconomy exchange information and configuration. Official docs: .

member.name: P:Biconomy.Net.BiconomyExchange.RateLimiter
member.summary: Rate limiter configuration for the Biconomy API.

member.name: M:Biconomy.Net.BiconomyExchange.FormatSymbol(System.String,System.String,CryptoExchange.Net.SharedApis.TradingMode,System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Format a base and quote asset to a Biconomy recognized symbol (BASE_QUOTE).

member.name: T:Biconomy.Net.BiconomyRateLimiters
member.summary: Rate limiter configuration for the Biconomy API.

member.summary: Event for when a rate limit is triggered.

member.name: E:Biconomy.Net.BiconomyRateLimiters.RateLimitUpdated
member.summary: Event when the rate limit is updated.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.Bind_BiconomyOptions(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.Object)
member.summary: Attempts to bind the given object instance to configuration values by matching property names against configuration keys recursively.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.TryGetConfigurationValue(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to get the configuration value for the specified key.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.ValidateConfigurationKeys(System.Type,System.Lazy{System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String}},Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.BinderOptions)
member.summary: If required by the binder options, validates that there are no unknown keys in the input configuration object.
